AC: 12

WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM

Slot: FEET
AC: 12
AGI: +5
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM

Crafted Boots

Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Question
QuoteReply
# Feb 13 2002 at 8:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767680939
5 posts
My warrior is wearing nearly a full set of Crustacean Armor. Should I start questing for crafted or just stay in crusty. He is a barb and the str and sta on the crusty are nice.
▲ Page top
RE: Question
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2002 at 11:14 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592342811123
View User Forum
Scholar
9,575 posts
This is terrible advice. You'd be better off getting Crafted, because Crafted has more AC. That's it. Most stats do nothing for warriors, and AC is god.

AC>HP>Resists>Stats (STA, STR, then on down)

Trust me, go for crafted.
▲ Page top
RE: Question
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2002 at 11:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757979394
10 posts
I would have to say, stay in the crusty...although you loose dex and cha, you gain much more str and sta from crusty. I am trying to get crusty armor because i am out growing my crafted. Im on the Tribunal Server and if you want to buy some crafted send me a tell. Balink and Letmethink are my chars.
▲ Page top
RE: Question
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2002 at 12:59 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758820417
View User Forum
1 post
I am also on the Tribunal with my 20th level warrior, Aegamin Loyalblade. I'll look out for you...
▲ Page top
Gems
QuoteReply
# Jan 29 2002 at 12:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756561707
16 posts
For those wanting to know where the various Gems are. They are sold in various jewelry shops, you can also pick them up in places like Karnor Castle, but it is much easier spending at max 90pp, but the gems should be lower depending on cha.
▲ Page top
Gems
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2021 at 6:24 PM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
Gems also drop from mobs, but the most difficult gems can drop from mobs that are 60+. It may not be worth getting a group together to kill mobs just for gem drops that you will have to roll for, unless you have an agreement in place in advance that if the gem that you are looking for drops, it automatically comes to you. Let the others have whatever other loot drops during that time as compensation for not rolling for the gems.

Edited, Feb 14th 2021 7:25pm by animekenji
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top

If ya know the best place to find there gems please post it thank you..

Kludian

Anonymous
I do you have to be 25th lvl to do the quest? Or can i start now at 20th lvl.
▲ Page top
RE: crafted?
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2002 at 12:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592254556949
32 posts
My best Friend did it at 22 with ease all he had was a suit of banded! so at 20 with bronze or plate you could easily and readily aquire this armor ( He Had an UBER 2hs though) shivers at the sight. his dads war alt is now using it hehe a troll needs the agility and such





Yo peace out.

Amarog 11 shadowknit of Cazic Thule worshiping Cazic Thule

Stand Guard leave doubt for the dieing!
▲ Page top
RE: crafted?
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2001 at 7:00 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592247182577
Scholar
110 posts
Yes, you can start at lvl 20, but all you can do is basically buying the 2 sapphires. I sincerely doubt you will be able to go into Permafrost and retrieve the Frost Totem from there - unless you have some rather high level friends to help you out.
▲ Page top
Crafted Armor
QuoteReply

__DEL__1592247271060
13 posts

Thanks
Rasep
17 Iskar war. The nameless

# Oct 15 2001 at 8:32 AM Rating: Excellent

Sage
137 posts
The picture above is an old one, pre Kunark. Iksar WAR can't wear crafted, sorry.

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Sep 21 2001 at 10:27 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I'm a lvl 10 HE warrior with a small amount of money, I'm on innoruuk server and I could really use some crafted boots ( in need them to balance out my leggings and I need them so I can kick magical creatures :P) send me a tell, my name is 'Orbade'
#Anonymous, Posted: Sep 18 2001 at 9:50 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I want to buy these i almost have a full suit of crafted. If anyone has them for sale give me a Tell on E'ci server
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 09 2001 at 4:34 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I am a level 25 warrior, and I don't have a single piece of crafted yet. I really want to start my suit of with the boots. Does anyone have a pair they want to sell? If so, send me a tell in the game.
Re: How long with Crafted
QuoteReply
# Jun 02 2001 at 12:59 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592249113945
View User Forum
Scholar
118 posts
Use your crafted untill you get to the Planes...Crafted (until Kunark and Velious) was the best full set of armor in the game.
▲ Page top
How long with Crafted?
QuoteReply
# May 31 2001 at 7:44 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245845412
63 posts
I have a lvl 24 warrior with alot of crafted stuff, and I am wondering, what lvl should I stop wearing crafted? When does it get to bad for my lvl?

Taiddas Kavilion,
Halfling warrior of the 24th season
Xegony server
▲ Page top
RE: How long with Crafted?
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2001 at 8:56 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1649292544618
Scholar
92 posts
You're very right. Keep crafted until your high 40's when you're big enough to go after better stuff. Unless you've got a 50k+ bankroll and can afford cobalt or better.
▲ Page top
RE: How long with Crafted?
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2001 at 9:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247182577
Scholar
110 posts
At 35 I'm currently wearing a combination of banded, bronze, fine plate and crafted... (in order of least to most)
